meaning: Sea 塔斯曼海(在澳大利亚和新西兰之间)
examples: The ice broke into many smaller icebergs after falling into Tasman Lake.
Where, ironically, the solution foreverything seems to be to look across the Tasman.
Brutal winter storms in the Tasman Sea made the leg from New Caledonia the most challenging.
In 1642, Abel Tasman discovered Van Diemen's land, named after his captain and later renamed Tasmania.
It is no wonder that thousands of New Zealanders are now living across the Tasman Sea.
